title: Implement minimal item storage and hauling jobs
summary: Implement the minimal item stack, storage demand/supply index and hauling job path needed by the first hauling/building vertical scenario.
acceptance: Item quantities are integer authoritative state and cannot become negative or duplicate across map, carrier and storage
Demand and supply indexes update on stack, storage and reservation state changes
Hauling reserves source amount, destination capacity and interaction cells before pickup
Scenario tests prove multiple haulers do not reserve the same quantity or leak carried items after cancellation

history.details: Implemented minimal item stack storage and hauling jobs with hauling tests and logistics-10k benchmark; required checks pass

changes_requested: High: Hauling pickup is not fail-closed. packages/sim-core/src/hauling-jobs.ts removes source quantity before validating the subsequent JobCore step; a failed pickup with invalid tick returns an error but leaves source quantity reduced, and later cancellation releases reservations without restoring the lost carried amount. This violates WM-0026 material conservation/cancel-after-pickup acceptance. Required checks otherwise pass.
Fixed hauling pickup and delivery fail-closed behavior; added invalid tick regression tests; required checks pass

review.summary: High: Hauling pickup is not fail-closed. packages/sim-core/src/hauling-jobs.ts removes source quantity before validating the subsequent JobCore step; a failed pickup with invalid tick returns an error but leaves source quantity reduced, and later cancellation releases reservations without restoring the lost carried amount. This violates WM-0026 material conservation/cancel-after-pickup acceptance. Required checks otherwise pass.
